results.alt: ARTITECT MACHINERY is a leading manufacturer of precision metal folding equipment. From our state-of-the-art facility, we design and build double folding machines, sheet metal folders, and complete folding solutions that set industry standards for accuracy, reliability, and productivity. Engineering Excellence Since 1999
